name: Can they make me see their doctor for my wrist injury in Murray UT?
description: Yes, attend IME or face denial; usually one with notice.[1]

mainEntity.name: Can they make me see their doctor for my wrist injury in Murray UT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, attend IME or face denial; usually one with notice.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, Utah allows insurer-requested independent medical exams (IME) with notice; refusal is non-cooperation denial grounds.[1] Limited to usually one per claim.[1] Key factors: (1) Adequate notice required; (2) Attend or risk benefits cut; (3) Prepare with your records; (4) Discuss concerns with adjuster.[1] Go prepared, be honest, follow up on findings. IMEs common—treat as routine.
